{
  Item1:
// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: Range
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal static class MyData
{


    private static readonly byte[] _rangeStarts = new byte[] {
        42, 62, 80, 100
    };

    private static readonly byte[] _rangeEnds = new byte[] {
        42, 62, 80, 100
    };
    
    public static bool Contains(byte key)
    {


        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
        {
            if (key >= _rangeStarts[i] && key <= _rangeEnds[i])
                return true;
        }

        return false;
    }

    public const int ItemCount = 4;
    public const byte MinKey = 42;
    public const byte MaxKey = 100;
}
,
  Item2: 
}
